title: Patient Services Representative
description: Pfizer's Cambridge location is seeking a compassionate Patient Services Representative to support patients accessing our innovative medicines. You'll serve as a vital link between patients, healthcare providers, and our support programs, helping ensure patients receive the medications they need. This on-site role is central to our mission of delivering breakthrough medicines to patients worldwide.
responsibilities: Answer patient and healthcare provider inquiries about Pfizer medications, side effects, and usage instructions
Process enrollment applications for patient assistance programs and support services
Manage patient documentation and maintain accurate records in our support systems
Coordinate with pharmacies and clinics to facilitate medication access and delivery
Respond to urgent patient concerns and escalate complex cases to clinical specialists
Document all interactions and generate reports on program utilization and patient outcomes

requirements.education: High School diploma or GED; Associate's degree in healthcare field preferred
skills: Strong customer service and empathy skills
Ability to communicate clearly with diverse patient populations
Proficiency with computer systems and phone communication tools
Detail-oriented with ability to handle confidential information

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance
Paid time off and flexible scheduling
On-site wellness facilities and health programs
